name: Noodles for Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs and add the salt. Gradually incorporate as much flour as can be mixed into a dough (about 1 cup). Mix well until smooth.
2. Cover and let stand for 30 minutes.
3. Roll out the dough thinly on a floured surface. Spread it on a clean cloth and allow to dry slightly.
4. Cut into narrow strips.
Source: Pennsylvania Dutch Cook Book - Fine Old Recipes, Culinary Arts Press, 1936.
